description: Comprehensive OI Type VI disease characterization summary panel — overview, phenotypes, treatment landscape, pathomechanism, key data and ontology terms
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, Circle, Rectangle
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(20, 14))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('#FAFAFA')

# Title
fig.suptitle('Osteogenesis Imperfecta Type VI — Disease Characterization Summary', 
             fontsize=20, fontweight='bold', y=0.98, color='#1a1a2e')
fig.text(0.5, 0.955, 'MONDO:0013515 | SERPINF1/PEDF | Autosomal Recessive', 
         fontsize=13, ha='center', color='#4a4a6a', style='italic')

# ---- Panel 1: Key Disease Facts (top-left) ----
ax1 = fig.add_axes([0.03, 0.58, 0.30, 0.35])
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax1.axis('off')
ax1.set_title('Disease Overview', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='#1a1a2e', pad=10)

facts = [
    ('Gene:', 'SERPINF1 (17p13.3)'),
    ('Protein:', 'PEDF (418 aa, serpin)'),
    ('Inheritance:', 'Autosomal recessive'),
    ('Penetrance:', 'Complete'),
    ('ClinVar pathogenic:', '170 + 40 likely path.'),
    ('Prevalence:', '<1 per 1,000,000'),
    ('Onset:', 'Infancy (>6 months)'),
    ('Course:', 'Progressive, lifelong'),
    ('Hallmark:', 'Fish-scale lamellae'),
    ('Biomarker:', 'Absent serum PEDF'),
]
for i, (label, value) in enumerate(facts):
    y = 9.2 - i * 0.95
    ax1.text(0.3, y, label, fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50', va='center')
    ax1.text(4.0, y, value, fontsize=10, color='#34495e', va='center')

# ---- Panel 2: Core Phenotypes (top-center) ----
ax2 = fig.add_axes([0.35, 0.58, 0.30, 0.35])
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax2.axis('off')
ax2.set_title('Clinical Phenotypes', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='#1a1a2e', pad=10)

phenotypes = [
    ('Recurrent fractures', '100%', 'HP:0002757', '#e74c3c'),
    ('Severe osteopenia', '100%', 'HP:0000938', '#e74c3c'),
    ('Skeletal deformities', '>90%', 'HP:0002652', '#e67e22'),
    ('Short stature', '>90%', 'HP:0004322', '#e67e22'),
    ('Vertebral compression', '>80%', 'HP:0002953', '#e67e22'),
    ('Chronic pain', 'High', 'HP:0012531', '#f39c12'),
    ('Wheelchair use', '~75%', 'HP:0002066', '#f39c12'),
    ('Scoliosis (adults)', '100%', '', '#e74c3c'),
]

for i, (name, freq, hpo, color) in enumerate(phenotypes):
    y = 9.2 - i * 1.1
    ax2.add_patch(Rectangle((0.2, y-0.35), 0.5, 0.7, facecolor=color, alpha=0.3, edgecolor=color, linewidth=1.5))
    ax2.text(1.0, y, name, fontsize=9.5, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50', va='center')
    ax2.text(7.5, y, freq, fontsize=9.5, color=color, fontweight='bold', va='center', ha='center')
    if hpo:
        ax2.text(9.3, y, hpo, fontsize=7, color='#7f8c8d', va='center', ha='center')

ax2.text(7.5, 9.8, 'Freq', fontsize=8, color='#7f8c8d', ha='center', fontweight='bold')

# Features ABSENT
ax2.text(0.3, 0.7, '✗ Blue sclerae — ABSENT', fontsize=9, color='#27ae60', fontweight='bold')
ax2.text(0.3, 0.0, '✗ Dentinogenesis imperfecta — ABSENT', fontsize=9, color='#27ae60', fontweight='bold')

# ---- Panel 3: Treatment Landscape (top-right) ----
ax3 = fig.add_axes([0.67, 0.58, 0.30, 0.35])
ax3.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax3.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax3.axis('off')
ax3.set_title('Treatment Landscape', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='#1a1a2e', pad=10)

treatments = [
    ('Bisphosphonates', 'Poor response', '#e74c3c', 'Standard care'),
    ('Denosumab', 'Targeted, effective', '#27ae60', 'Anti-RANKL'),
    ('  + ZA alternating', 'Prevents rebound', '#2ecc71', 'Novel protocol'),
    ('Setrusumab', 'Phase 3 trials', '#3498db', 'Anti-sclerostin'),
    ('Romosozumab', 'Phase 3 trials', '#3498db', 'Anti-sclerostin'),
    ('Fresolimumab', 'Phase 1 done', '#9b59b6', 'Anti-TGF-beta'),
    ('MSC therapy', 'Phase 1/2', '#9b59b6', 'Cell therapy'),
    ('Local PEDF', '+52% bone vol.', '#e67e22', 'Preclinical'),
    ('IM rodding', 'Surgical standard', '#7f8c8d', 'Surgery'),
]

for i, (name, status, color, category) in enumerate(treatments):
    y = 9.2 - i * 1.0
    ax3.add_patch(Circle((0.5, y), 0.25, facecolor=color, alpha=0.7, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1))
    ax3.text(1.0, y, name, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50', va='center')
    ax3.text(5.5, y, status, fontsize=8.5, color=color, va='center')
    ax3.text(9.0, y, category, fontsize=7, color='#95a5a6', va='center', ha='center')

# ---- Panel 4: Pathomechanism summary (bottom-left) ----
ax4 = fig.add_axes([0.03, 0.05, 0.45, 0.48])
ax4.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax4.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax4.axis('off')
ax4.set_title('Pathomechanism: 5 Disrupted Pathways', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='#1a1a2e', pad=10)

# Central node
ax4.add_patch(Circle((5, 8.5), 0.8, facecolor='#e74c3c', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='#c0392b', linewidth=2))
ax4.text(5, 8.5, 'PEDF\nLoss', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='white', ha='center', va='center')

pathways = [
    (1.5, 5.5, '1. OPG/RANKL\n   Dysregulation', '#e74c3c', '-> Increased\n   osteoclasts'),
    (4.0, 3.5, '2. TGF-beta\n   Antagonism Lost', '#e67e22', '-> Bone + vascular\n   pathology'),
    (5.0, 1.5, '3. Wnt/beta-catenin\n   Impaired', '#3498db', '-> MSC->adipocyte\n   shift'),
    (7.0, 3.5, '4. Osteocyte Gene\n   Dysregulation', '#9b59b6', '-> Sclerostin/MEPE\n   alterations'),
    (8.5, 5.5, '5. VEGF/ERK\n   Dysregulated', '#27ae60', '-> Altered bone\n   vasculature'),
]

for x, y, label, color, effect in pathways:
    ax4.annotate('', xy=(x, y+1.0), xytext=(5, 7.8),
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color=color, lw=2, alpha=0.7))
    ax4.add_patch(Rectangle((x-1.2, y-0.6), 2.4, 1.3, facecolor=color, alpha=0.15, edgecolor=color, linewidth=1.5))
    ax4.text(x, y+0.25, label, fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color=color, ha='center', va='center')
    ax4.text(x, y-0.35, effect, fontsize=7, color='#555', ha='center', va='center')

# ER stress box
ax4.add_patch(Rectangle((1.5, 7.5), 2.2, 1.0, facecolor='#f39c12', alpha=0.2, edgecolor='#f39c12', linewidth=1))
ax4.text(2.6, 8.0, '6. ER Stress\n(missense mut.)', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='#f39c12', ha='center', va='center')

# ---- Panel 5: Key Numbers and Ontology (bottom-right) ----
ax5 = fig.add_axes([0.52, 0.05, 0.45, 0.48])
ax5.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax5.set_ylim(0, 10)
ax5.axis('off')
ax5.set_title('Key Data & Ontology Terms', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='#1a1a2e', pad=10)

# Ontology terms section
onto_y = 9.0
ax5.text(0.2, onto_y, 'Ontology Coverage', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')
onto_y -= 0.7

ontologies = [
    ('HPO:', '15+ phenotype terms annotated'),
    ('GO:', '10+ biological process terms'),
    ('CL:', '4 cell types (osteoblast, osteoclast, osteocyte, MSC)'),
    ('UBERON:', '8+ anatomical terms'),
    ('CHEBI:', '7 chemical entities'),
    ('MAXO:', '8+ management/treatment terms'),
]
for abbr, desc in ontologies:
    ax5.text(0.4, onto_y, abbr, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#8e44ad')
    ax5.text(2.0, onto_y, desc, fontsize=9, color='#34495e')
    onto_y -= 0.6

# Key numbers
onto_y -= 0.3
ax5.text(0.2, onto_y, 'Key Quantitative Data', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')
onto_y -= 0.7

numbers = [
    ('30+', 'PMIDs cited with exact abstract quotes'),
    ('170+40', 'Pathogenic + likely pathogenic ClinVar variants'),
    ('52%', 'Bone volume increase with local PEDF (mice)'),
    ('84%', 'P1NP increase with setrusumab (Phase 2a)'),
    ('>50%', 'Increased adiposity in PEDF-KO mice'),
    ('6.5/100K', 'Annual OI incidence (all types, Netherlands)'),
    ('13', 'Patients in largest OI VI follow-up study'),
    ('5', 'Active Phase 2/3 clinical trials'),
]

for num, desc in numbers:
    ax5.add_patch(Rectangle((0.3, onto_y-0.25), 1.4, 0.5, facecolor='#3498db', alpha=0.15, edgecolor='#3498db'))
    ax5.text(1.0, onto_y, num, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#2980b9', ha='center', va='center')
    ax5.text(2.0, onto_y, desc, fontsize=8.5, color='#34495e', va='center')
    onto_y -= 0.6

plt.savefig('/output/plot_3.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight', facecolor='#FAFAFA')
plt.show()
print("Summary visualization saved successfully.")
